ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: let ls = document.querySelector("#left-sidebar"); ls.classList.toggle("is-collapsed", window.innerWidth < 768); ls.style.setProperty("--sidebar-width", localStorage.getItem("sidebar-left-width"));
ast.target: let ls = document.querySelector("#left-sidebar"); ls.classList.toggle("is-collapsed", window.innerWidth < 768); ls.style.setProperty("--sidebar-width", localStorage.getItem("sidebar-left-width"));

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: let rs = document.querySelector("#right-sidebar"); rs.classList.toggle("is-collapsed", window.innerWidth < 768); rs.style.setProperty("--sidebar-width", localStorage.getItem("sidebar-right-width"));
ast.target: let rs = document.querySelector("#right-sidebar"); rs.classList.toggle("is-collapsed", window.innerWidth < 768); rs.style.setProperty("--sidebar-width", localStorage.getItem("sidebar-right-width"));

ast.name: description
ast.source: Завантажити будь-які онлайн-ресурси / зображення / скрипти, щоб сторінку можна було переглядати офлайн. Або щоб веб-сайт не залежав від CDN.
ast.target: 下载所有在线资源/图片/脚本，以便页面可离线查看，或使网站不依赖CDN。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Включити CSS з наступних плагінів в експортований HTML. Якщо функції плагінів не відображаються коректно, спробуйте додати плагін до цього списку. Уникайте додавання плагінів, якщо ви не помітили конкретної проблеми, оскільки більше CSS збільшить час завантаження вашої сторінки.
ast.target: 在导出的HTML中包含来自以下插件的CSS。如果插件功能无法正确显示，请尝试将插件添加到此列表。避免添加未发现具体问题的插件，因为更多的CSS会增加页面加载时间。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 在导出的HTML中包含具有以下ID的样式标签中的CSS

ast.name: description

regex.source: error("Unknown error from PostCSS plugin. Your current PostCSS version is " + runtimeVer + ", but " + pluginName + " uses " + pluginVer + ". Perhaps this is the source of the error below.")
regex.target: 错误("来自PostCSS插件的未知错误。您当前的PostCSS版本是" + runtimeVer + "，但" + pluginName + "使用的是" + pluginVer + "。这可能是以下错误的原因。")

regex.source: error("Legacy octal literals are not allowed in strict mode")
regex.target: 错误("严格模式下不允许使用旧式八进制字面量")

regex.source: error("Numeric separators are not allowed at the end of numeric literals")
regex.target: 错误("数字分隔符不允许出现在数字字面量的末尾")

regex.source: error("Only one underscore is allowed as numeric separator")
regex.target: 错误("数字分隔符只允许使用一个下划线")

regex.source: error("Invalid or unexpected token")
regex.target: 错误("无效或意外的标记")

regex.source: error("Expecting hex-character between {}")
regex.target: 错误("期望在{}之间出现十六进制字符")

regex.source: error("Unicode reference out of bounds")
regex.target: 错误("Unicode引用超出范围")

regex.source: error("Octal escape sequences are not allowed in template strings")
regex.target: 错误("模板字符串中不允许使用八进制转义序列")

regex.source: error("Legacy octal escape sequences are not allowed in strict mode")
regex.target: 错误("严格模式下不允许使用旧式八进制转义序列")

regex.source: error("Invalid hex-character pattern in string")
regex.target: 错误("字符串中的十六进制字符模式无效")

regex.source: error("Unterminated string constant")
regex.target: 错误("未终止的字符串常量")

regex.source: error("Expecting UnicodeEscapeSequence -- uXXXX or u{XXXX}")
regex.target: 错误("期望UnicodeEscapeSequence -- uXXXX或u{XXXX}")

regex.source: error("First identifier char is an invalid identifier char")
regex.target: 错误("第一个标识符字符是无效的标识符字符")

regex.source: error("Invalid escaped identifier char")
regex.target: 错误("无效的转义标识符字符")

regex.source: error("Escaped characters are not allowed in keywords")
regex.target: 错误("关键字中不允许使用转义字符")

regex.source: error("Unexpected character '" + ch + "'")
regex.target: 错误("意外的字符 '" + ch + "'")

regex.source: error("Supported options:")
regex.target: 错误("支持的选项：")

regex.source: error("- " + phase + ": " + result.timings[phase].toFixed(3) + "s")
regex.target: 错误("- " + phase + ": " + result.timings[phase].toFixed(3) + "s")

regex.target: 日志("压缩耗时：" + (Date.now() - start) + "ms")

regex.source: description: "Clear the site cache to re-export all files."
regex.target: description: "清除站点缓存以重新导出所有文件。"

regex.source: description: "Control various features of the exported page."
regex.target: description: "控制导出页面的各种功能。"

regex.source: description: "Control settings on the document itself"
regex.target: description: "控制文档本身的设置"

regex.source: description: "Holds all the other features like the file nav, outline, theme toggle, graph view, etc..."
regex.target: description: "包含所有其他功能，如文件导航、大纲、主题切换、图形视图等。"

regex.source: description: "Shows a file tree used to explore the exported vault."
regex.target: description: "显示用于浏览导出仓库的文件树。"

regex.source: description: "Shows a list of the open document's headers."
regex.target: description: "显示当前打开文档的标题列表。"

regex.source: description: "Shows a visual, interactive representation of your vault. (NOTE: this is only available for exports hosted on a web server)"
regex.target: description: "显示仓库的可视化交互式表示。（注意：仅适用于托管在 Web 服务器上的导出）"

regex.source: description: "Allows you search the vault, listing matching files and headers. (NOTE: this is only available for exports hosted on a web server)"
regex.target: description: "允许您搜索仓库，列出匹配的文件和标题。（注意：仅适用于托管在 Web 服务器上的导出）"

regex.source: description: "Show hover previews when you hover over internal links to other documents."
regex.target: description: "当您悬停在指向其他文档的内部链接上时，显示悬停预览。"

regex.source: description: "Allows you to switch between dark and light theme dynamically."
regex.target: description: "允许您在深色和浅色主题之间动态切换。"

regex.source: description: "Insert a given .html file onto the page which can include custom JS or CSS"
regex.target: description: "将给定的 .html 文件插入页面，其中可以包含自定义 JS 或 CSS"

regex.source: description: "Displays all the documents which link to the currently opened document."
regex.target: description: "显示所有链接到当前打开文档的文档。"

regex.target: description: "显示当前打开文档的标签。"

regex.target: description: "显示当前打开文档的别名。"

regex.target: description: "为导出的站点生成 RSS 源"

regex.source: description: "Download any online assets / images / scripts so the page can be viewed offline. Or so the website does not depend on a CDN."
regex.target: description: "下载任何在线资源/图片/脚本，以便页面可以离线查看，或者网站不依赖 CDN。"

regex.source: description: "Include the CSS from the following plugins in the exported HTML. If plugin features aren't rendering correctly, try adding the plugin to this list. Avoid adding plugins unless you specifically notice a problem, because more CSS will increase the loading time of your page."
regex.target: description: "在导出的 HTML 中包含以下插件的 CSS。如果插件功能无法正确渲染，请尝试将插件添加到此列表。除非您特别注意到问题，否则避免添加插件，因为更多的 CSS 会增加页面的加载时间。"
